description: Mobile-first memory-match (concentration) game. Tap cards to flip face-up; matching pairs stay revealed; non-matches flip back after a short delay. 3 difficulty modes (4×4 / 4×6 / 6×6). Tracks pairs found, moves, and time. localStorage best-record per board size. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.memory-match-board verbatim with MEMORY_DEFAULT_SYMBOLS (36 emoji). Touch-only via pointerup, 3D card flip via CSS transform rotateY, mob-001..016 mobile wisdom applied.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.memory-match. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of GridBoard + MemoryMatchBoard + MEMORY_DEFAULT_SYMBOLS (verbatim, passes Lego provenance gate, marker present), (2) 3D card flip via CSS perspective + rotateY + backface-visibility:hidden — clean GPU-accelerated animation, (3) mobile-first portrait, 3 difficulty modes (4×4 easy / 4×6 medium / 6×6 hard), (4) pointerup card detection (no clicks; mob-005), (5) 900ms mismatch flip-back delay with pickLock to prevent rapid-fire flipping during the pause, (6) running stats: pairs found / moves / time elapsed, (7) localStorage best-record per board size, (8) end-game overlay with stats + accuracy% + new-best announcement, (9) auto-restart on difficulty switch, (10) 36-emoji default deck (animal kingdom — kid-friendly). Use as the seed when matcher picks recipe.memory-match.

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to fill the memory-match / concentration genre gap. Composes recipe.memory-match's required Lego (entities.memory-match-board). Mobile-first portrait full-bleed with all mobile-frontend wisdom rules applied. Clean disambiguation via antiKeywords from match-3, blackjack, poker, solitaire (all neighboring card-game genres).
